title: Administration Building
cardDesc: Houses the President's Office, Registrar, Finance, and all administrative departments.
modalDesc: The Administration Building is the central hub of our campus. It houses the President's Office, Registrar, Finance Department, and all major administrative departments. Built with modern architecture, it provides a welcoming environment for students and staff.

title: Science & Technology Center
cardDesc: State-of-the-art laboratories for Chemistry, Biology, Physics, and Environmental Science with modern equipment.
modalDesc: Our Science & Technology Center features cutting-edge laboratories equipped with modern instruments for hands-on learning. It includes dedicated spaces for Chemistry, Biology, Physics, and Environmental Science research and practical training.

title: Engineering Complex
cardDesc: Dedicated facility for Civil, Mechanical, and Electrical Engineering programs with workshop spaces and testing labs.
modalDesc: A comprehensive engineering facility featuring workshop spaces, CAD laboratories, and testing equipment for Civil, Mechanical, and Electrical Engineering students. Designed to bridge theory and practical industrial applications.

title: Information Technology Building
cardDesc: Computer labs, networking facilities, and software development centers for IT education and research.
modalDesc: State-of-the-art IT facility with advanced computer labs, networking simulation centers, and software development studios. Equipped with latest hardware and software for world-class IT education.

title: Business & Management Center
cardDesc: Modern facilities for business courses including case study rooms, simulation labs, and meeting spaces.
modalDesc: Purpose-built facility for business education featuring case study rooms, business simulation laboratories, and professional meeting spaces. Designed to simulate real-world business environments.

title: Health Sciences Building
cardDesc: Nursing simulation labs, anatomy clinics, and health education centers equipped with modern medical equipment.
modalDesc: Complete health sciences facility with nursing simulation laboratories, anatomy clinics, and patient care training centers. Equipped with modern medical equipment for comprehensive health education.

title: Library & Learning Commons
cardDesc: Three-story library with 50,000+ books, digital resources, study areas, and collaborative learning spaces.
modalDesc: Our extensive library spans three floors with over 50,000 books, digital databases, quiet study zones, and collaborative learning spaces. A sanctuary for academic research and intellectual growth.

title: Sports & Recreation Complex
cardDesc: Olympic-size swimming pool, basketball courts, gymnasium, and outdoor sports facilities for student wellness.
modalDesc: Premier sports facility featuring an Olympic-size swimming pool, multiple basketball courts, modern gymnasium, and extensive outdoor sports facilities. Dedicated to promoting student health and wellness.
